examples.title: Executive Summary PPTX
examples.description: Applies a common executive theme and presentation pattern, then renders a short decision-oriented PPTX deck.

examples.title: Kyberion Marketing Deck PPTX
examples.description: Uses the bundled Kyberion marketing deck pattern content and renders a themed PPTX artifact.

examples.title: Strategic Roadmap PPTX
examples.description: Builds a roadmap-style PPTX with custom milestone content on top of the strategic roadmap pattern.

examples.title: Mermaid Architecture Diagram
examples.description: Renders a Mermaid architecture graph to SVG using the shared Kyberion theme vocabulary.

examples.title: D2 Process Diagram
examples.description: Renders a D2 workflow diagram to SVG for more polished stakeholder-facing process visuals.

examples.title: AWS Terraform Draw.io Document
examples.description: Generates a local .drawio architecture document from an AWS-style graph without sending topology data to external services.

examples.title: Seat Chart XLSX
examples.description: Renders a printable office seat chart workbook from a native XLSX ADF sample.

examples.title: Project WBS XLSX
examples.description: Renders a project WBS workbook suitable for execution planning and delivery checkpoints.

examples.title: RAID Register XLSX
examples.description: Renders a RAID tracker workbook with category-specific styling for operator review.

examples.title: PPTX Master Theme Extract
examples.description: Generates a source deck, distills its theme and master placeholders, and stores the extracted context for inspection.

examples.title: PPTX Master Theme Reuse
examples.description: Extracts a theme from a source PowerPoint and renders a derivative deck that reuses the master slide contract.

examples.title: Proposal Storyline PPTX
examples.description: Legacy compatibility example for proposal storyline inspection and slide-content debugging.

examples.title: Proposal PPTX (Canonical Document Brief)
examples.description: Builds a proposal deck from the canonical document-brief contract through document_outline_from_brief, brief_to_design_protocol, and generate_document.

examples.title: Mermaid Diagram (Canonical Document Brief)
examples.description: Builds a Mermaid diagram from the canonical document-brief contract using diagram/architecture-diagram/mmd routing.

examples.title: D2 Diagram (Canonical Document Brief)
examples.description: Builds a D2 diagram from the canonical document-brief contract using diagram/process-diagram/d2 routing.

examples.title: Draw.io Diagram (Canonical Document Brief)
examples.description: Builds a local draw.io document from the canonical document-brief contract using diagram/architecture-diagram/drawio routing.

examples.title: WBS Spreadsheet (Canonical Document Brief)
examples.description: Builds an XLSX tracker from the canonical document-brief contract using spreadsheet/tracker/xlsx routing.

examples.title: Semantic Tracker Spreadsheet (Canonical Document Brief)
examples.description: Builds an XLSX tracker from semantic rows and column definitions without requiring a prebuilt XLSX protocol file.

examples.title: Report DOCX (Canonical Document Brief)
examples.description: Builds a DOCX report from the canonical document-brief contract using document/report/docx routing.

examples.title: Report PDF (Canonical Document Brief)
examples.description: Builds a PDF report from the canonical document-brief contract using document/report/pdf routing.

examples.title: Invoice PDF (Canonical Document Brief)
examples.description: Builds an invoice PDF from the canonical document-brief contract plus a knowledge-owned document layout template.

examples.title: Split a (password-protected) PDF into one file per page
examples.description: Decrypts a password-protected PDF (password supplied at runtime via PDF_PASSWORD) and splits it losslessly into one file per page via the pypdf bridge. Requires pypdf (python3 -m pip install pypdf).

examples.title: Extract a page range / subset from a PDF
examples.description: Keeps only the selected pages (1-based spec like "1-3,7") and writes a new PDF via the pypdf bridge. Requires pypdf.

examples.title: Merge multiple PDFs into one
examples.description: Concatenates two or more PDFs into a single file via the pypdf bridge. Requires pypdf.
